TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Greenskin Tribes Faction.

Translations.Comment: Literal translation maintaining the fantasy wargame tone. Maintains the tribal and savage nature of the faction.
Standard compound word for Orc Warriors. Keeps the brutal and direct feel of ork military units.
Грубияны conveys brutality and crude nature, fitting for the savage Orc brutes.
Толпа (mob/horde) conveys the chaotic, swarming nature of goblin troops.
Копьеносцев (spear-carriers) differentiates this mob type from other goblin formations.
Кабаны (wild boars) emphasize the savage, primal nature of greenskin cavalry.
Волчьи (wolf) emphasizes the wild, dangerous nature of goblin cavalry units.
Боевая колесница (war chariot) conveys the epic, mythical power of this heavy unit.
Лучники (archers) clearly identifies these as bow-wielding goblin troops.
Метатели болтов (bolt throwers) maintains consistency with siege weapon terminology.
Метатель камней (stone thrower) maintains consistent artillery terminology across factions.
Standard Russian plural for trolls, a classic fantasy creature type.
Великан (giant) is the classic Russian fantasy term, evoking mythical power.
Виверна is the Russian transliteration of wyvern, a recognized fantasy creature.
Гигантский паук (giant spider) evokes the monstrous, horrifying nature of this creature.
Военный вождь (war chief) conveys both tribal authority and martial prowess.
Шаман (shaman) fits the tribal mysticism and magical nature of goblin spellcasters.
Король гоблинов (Goblin King) is a grand title befitting the faction leader.
